untranslatable_reason: The signal requires a DecisionTreeRegressor ML model trained on options Greeks (CE_ITMNESS, PE_ITMNESS, CallIV, CallDelta, CallVega, CallTheta, CallGamma, PutIV, PutDelta, PutVega, PutTheta, PutGamma) and custom strangle-specific features (Strangle_Price, Days_To_Expiry) to predict Strangle_Return. None of these options Greeks or strangle features are available in the ALLOWED_INDICATORS list. The backtest engine cannot execute ML model predictions or access options chain data. A proxy entry using standard technical indicators (RSI, ADX) has been provided as a fallback, but does not accurately represent the original ML-based signal logic.
translation_notes: Original signal is ML-model dependent and cannot be fully translated to rule-based conditions. Provided entry_short conditions use RSI and ADX as technical indicator substitutes, but these do NOT replicate the DecisionTreeRegressor's prediction logic. Exit condition at expiration (Days_To_Expiry = 0) cannot be directly coded without a days-to-expiry indicator in the standard list. Manual position closure at strangle expiration is required.
